- About Us

Today more than ever, Administration needs a new way of thinking---an innovative approach towards what it does and about the quality of its ideas especially in the institutes of eminence. This new way of thinking is about engaging staff in structured activities and observable behaviours to facilitate knowledge transmission in keeping with the latest developments in pedagogy in line with Institute’s Vision.

Our motive in Establishment II is to endeavour in creating a transformational experience that promotes institutes’ overall success, well-being, and resiliency at all levels in all domains of Administrative Affairs.

Establishment II Section is headed by Assistant Registrar (Establishment II). The section is concerned with the process of responsive people-centric modern administration that is an integral part of Good Governance.

# Page Title: Innovative Administration & Knowledge Engagement | IIT Jammu

### About Us

Today more than ever, Administration needs a new way of thinking---an innovative approach towards what it does and about the quality of its ideas especially in the institutes of eminence. This new way of thinking is about engaging staff in structured activities and observable behaviours to facilitate knowledge transmission in keeping with the latest developments in pedagogy in line with Institute’s Vision.

### Message

I know that the past few years have been challenging for us all, with the ongoing pandemic affecting both our personal and professional lives. However, I have been continuously impressed by the resilience and adaptability shown by our team. As the Assistant Registrar, I am here to assist you with any administrative issues related to Establishment II. As we move forward, I am confident that we will continue to face any challenges that come our way with determination and teamwork.

#

All matters relating to following subjects are dealt by the Establishment Section:-

**General Administrative Matters**

1. CCS(CCA) Rules 1965, CCS(Conduct) Rules 1964, CCS (Temporary Service) Rules 1965- interpretation and application.
2. Retirement/Voluntary Retirement / Pre-mature Retirement / Extension in Service
3. Verification of character & antecedents
4. Promotion, Seniority Departmental Examinations and Review of MACP Scheme cases
5. Processing of House Building Advance, Computer Advance, Children Education Allowance, etc
6. Maintenance of in-position strength and sanctioned strength
7. Recruitment process for all Regular/Contractual/Third party employees including managing HR requisition, drafting and publishing advertisement, query handling, applications forms, preparation and issuance of Offer of appointments, issuing joining orde
Puja Rajyaguru is the head or coordinator of the E2 section at IIT Jammu. Designation: Assistant Registrar (Establishment II).
Contact details for E2 section at IIT Jammu.
Desh Raj Meena is a member of the E2 section at IIT Jammu. Designation: Senior Assistant. Email: deshraj.meena@iitjammu.ac.in.
Sakshi Dubey is a member of the E2 section at IIT Jammu. Designation: Junior Section Officer. Email: sakshi.dubey@iitjammu.ac.in.
